name: Cosmo
description: Cosmo is a kind and gentle character, though she often feels guilt because she was unable to save anyone from her home planet. She also seems to suffer from a low self-esteem issue, often calling herself "unworthy" or blaming herself for the hardships that she and her friends had to endure. Cosmo also dislikes violence, but acknowledges that fighting is sometimes a necessity, although she herself is unable to fight. name: Dean Winchester
nativeName: ディーン・ウィンチェスター
description: Dean was born on January 24, 1979 to John and Mary Winchester in Lawrence, Kansas. He is the couples first child, four years older than his younger brother Sam. name: Enigma
description: A powerful phantom who can steal the abilities of ability users by kissing them and use their powers for herself. The phantom has the appearance of a young woman in dark clothing with a black hat and resembles a gunslinger from the old west. She is a cunning phantom who will not hesitate to make use of deceitful tactics.

name: Escher
description: A kind-hearted nun serving at a church in the Dane district of the Kingdom of Saloum. Renowned for her beautiful singing voice and her ability to heal others, Escher has a past connection with Lloyd. (Source: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability Official Site)

name: Gandharva
description: The king of the Gandharva Clan. He is searching for his daughter, Shakuntala.

name: Grandis Granva
nativeName: グランディス・グランバァ
description: Grandis is a 28 year-old woman. She was born into a rich Italian family, but is now broke and disowned by her relatives. She is the leader of the "Grandis Gang", a trio of jewel thieves. After being rescued along with Nadia, Jean and Marie by the Nautilus, she and her henchmen befriend the children. She develops a huge crush on Capt. Nemo. She also becomes a mother-figure to Nadia.

name: Hairi Takahara
description: Hairi is a young man who is not a native to Torishirojima, as he grew up in a more urban area. He used to be a dedicated swimmer at his high school in the city, but after a certain incident he is now afraid of going into the water. Due to said incident, he uses the recent death of his grandmother as an excuse to come to the island for the summer to take care of her estate sale.

name: Hibird
description: This bird used to be one of Birds' birds. After [Hibari](https://anilist.co/character/1858/Kyouya-Hibari) taught him the anthem of Namimori Middle School, the bird became attached to Hibari, often sitting on his head or shoulder throughout the series. The bird was subsequently nicknamed Hibird due to its connection to Hibari. It has been shown that Hibird understands Hibari's commands and what he says. name: Hyatt
description: Excel's junior officer, with a penchant for dying and reviving in quick succession. She is noticeably Ilpalazzo's favorite officer, usually receiving lighter punishment and higher promotions than Excel. Hyatt is a rather innocent, naive and sensible woman, often serving as the agent that thinks things through more as opposed to Excel who seems to act on impulse.
